headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Shines on CAN SLIM Stock Screener With Strong Earnings and Relative Strength
summary: Newmont Corp shows strong CAN SLIM growth metrics with 132% EPS growth, 45.8% sales growth, 54.9% three-year earnings growth, and a low P/E of 11.23, but faces technical weakness with a 3/10 rating.
